summary: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web platforms, fintech systems, SaaS products, and high-load applications using PHP/Laravel, Node.js, and modern React-based frameworks. Strong background in backend architecture, REST API development, microservices, distributed systems, and DevOps workflows. Experienced in designing and delivering production-grade solutions from architecture to deployment in international and distributed teams.
